title: Southwest Gas Customer Account
description: A Southwest Gas customer account for natural gas distribution service in Arizona, Nevada, or California, including service address, usage, and billing information.

accountName.description: Name of the account holder (individual or business).

serviceAddress.description: Physical address receiving natural gas service.

serviceType.description: Customer classification for rate and service purposes.

rateSchedule.description: Tariff rate schedule code applied to this account.

meterNumber.description: Meter serial number at the service address.

dueDate.description: Payment due date for the current balance.

budgetBillingAmount.description: Fixed monthly budget billing amount if enrolled in the program.

paperlessBilling.description: Whether the account is enrolled in paperless billing.

autopay.description: Whether the account is enrolled in automatic payment.
